productDisplayName: New Hide Men Solid Black Belts
description: Embossed to look like finely woven leather, this black Newhide belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe! Length: 34" Made of leather for durability and style butterfly to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Use a brass polish to maintain buckle shine Use a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
